gt_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T1.birth_date) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.account_id = 130
pred_sql:
SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T1.birth_date)
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
WHERE T2.account_id = 130 AND T2.type = 'OWNER'
question: What year was account owner number 130 born?
